description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Generate Bicep IaC files to provision Azure infrastructure for the Photo Album application, including Container Apps Environment, Container Registry, PostgreSQL Flexible Server, Key Vault, Managed Identity, and Log Analytics.
tasks.requirements: Generate Bicep infrastructure-as-code files to provision all required Azure resources for deploying the Photo Album Spring Boot application. Resources include: Azure Container Apps Environment, Azure Container Registry (Basic SKU), Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server, Azure Key Vault, User-Assigned Managed Identity with AcrPull role, and Log Analytics Workspace. The PostgreSQL server should use Managed Identity for passwordless authentication via Service Connector. The Container App should use the azure Spring profile (SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=azure) and expose port 8080.
tasks.taskSummary: Generated Bicep IaC files in ./infra/ with 7 modular templates covering Container Apps, ACR, PostgreSQL Flexible Server, Key Vault, Managed Identity, and Log Analytics. All 25 IaC rules validated. Provision was not executed (provision=false).

tasks.description: Containerize the Photo Album application using the existing multi-stage Dockerfile for deployment to Azure Container Apps.
tasks.requirements: Validate and use the existing multi-stage Dockerfile that builds with Maven 3.9.6 and Eclipse Temurin JDK 21 and runs on Eclipse Temurin JRE 21. The Dockerfile should produce a production-ready container image exposing port 8080 with health check endpoints via Spring Boot Actuator, container-aware JVM settings, and a non-root user for security.
tasks.taskSummary: Validated existing multi-stage Dockerfile. The Dockerfile uses Maven 3.9.6 with Eclipse Temurin JDK 21 for the build stage and Eclipse Temurin JRE 21 for the runtime stage. It includes production-ready features: non-root user (appuser), container-aware JVM settings (UseContainerSupport, MaxRAMPercentage, G1GC), health check via /actuator/health/liveness, curl for health probes, and exposes port 8080. The Dockerfile is ready for Azure Container Apps deployment.

tasks.description: Deploy the Photo Album application to Azure Container Apps with passwordless PostgreSQL authentication via Managed Identity.
tasks.requirements: Deploy the containerized Photo Album application to Azure Container Apps. Build and push the container image to Azure Container Registry, then update the Container App to use the new image. Configure Service Connector for passwordless PostgreSQL Flexible Server authentication using User-Assigned Managed Identity. The application should use the azure Spring profile with health probes configured on the /actuator/health endpoint.
tasks.resourceStatus: Will create new resources via Bicep deployment
